name: gws-proxy
description: Adds gws-<alias> CLI profiles that authenticate against the shared 49x gws CLI proxy OAuth client. Users get gmail/calendar/drive access through gws without setting up their own GCP project, OAuth consent screen, or OAuth client. The headline path is /gws-proxy:add-account <alias> <email> which installs the gws CLI if missing, drops the bundled client_secret.json into ~/.config/gws-<alias>/, runs OAuth consent, and creates the gws-<alias> wrapper plus /<alias> slash command.
